spans.text: throughout with ev’ry scene of pain , From cain to george
second Cain , true likeness of the first
Go second Cain , true likeness of the first , And strew thy blasted head with homely dust
, haunt the tombs , and single out the place Where earth itself shall suffer a disgrace
the place Where earth itself shall suffer a disgrace
if he who sleeps there can return
This sport of death — this cockpit of mankind
the tear from off the sister’s cheek , And sweetly tells the sorrows she would speak
kiss an answer as the easiest task
a horror that would wound like steel
Thou only herd’st but lives not with mankind , And prone to love like some outrageous ape Thou know’st each class of beings by their shape
to love like some outrageous ape Thou know’st each class of beings by their shape
